victim.value: Alex, a young person killed by their abusive brother Andy in an alley
victim.quote: Andy jumped on me, rolling me over to face the sky, and continued to smash at my face, my stomach, my everywhere.

closed_world.value: Urban alley setting where the violence occurs
closed_world.quote: The ally was lit by the dim flicker of stars.

culprit_and_motive.value: Brother Andy kills Alex in a rage over disobedience and perceived defiance
culprit_and_motive.quote: You're such a fucking faggot, Alex! Get back in the apartment before I kick your ass!

social_world.value: Dysfunctional family power dynamic with abusive older brother dominating younger sibling through violence and intimidation
social_world.quote: What the hell are you doing out here! I told you to stay inside!

_meta.title: ebook natalie wood saving alex storm
